MENU

Dear students, the information related to the consulates are given below so as to assist you about the visa issues. It is under students’ responsibility to reach the latest information on the visa issues and to gather the documents required.

Please click

here

to visit the EU Immigration Portal to get informed about the short and long term visas and residence permit requirements in the EU countries

Czech Republic

Please note that getting Czech visa takes about 2 months and all the documents to be sent from the receiving institution must be in Czech Language. Please inform the coordinators from receiving university about the visa procedures by e-mail and ask for the required documents to be prepared in Czech Language, so that you could complete your application earlier.

www.mzv.cz/istanbul/tr/
